Mario.overview: Well-rounded, great for learning fundamentals. No bad matchups, no dominant ones either.

skills: Get comfortable with short hopping (tap jump or tap the stick lightly)
Use N-air as your main approach — it's fast and safe
Learn F-smash for punishing laggy moves on the ground

Ledge trap setups with F-smash, dash attack, and grab reads

Sweetspot Up-B out of shield for massive punishes
Wavebounce Green Missile to cover both directions in neutral
Edgeguard with N-air meteor spike — timing is tight but stocks free kills

N-air landing pressure into grab/Up-B mixup on shield
Ledge trap with D-tilt, grab, and Up-B coverage
Consistent sweetspot Up-B punishes out of shield in all situations

F-air string into Up-smash kill confirm at high percent
Edgeguard with B-air or D-air spike below the ledge

Ledge trap coverage with D-tilt, grab, and F-smash
Consistent edgeguards — know when B-air beats each recovery type

Use your floatiness to bait attacks and punish whiffs with Rest
Pound into Rest as a read on airdodge or landing
B-air wall: space B-airs just outside opponent's range to bait approaches
Sing (up-B) as a ledge trap — rare but catches predictable ledge options
Aerial drift mixups to make your movement unpredictable
Rest out of shield on predictable moves like laggy aerials
